nav.switchWhenReady: Switch tabs after the current load finishes

containers.title: Containers
containers.execHint: Runs as sh -c inside the container. Requires /bin/sh (common on Linux images).
containers.removeConfirm: Remove this container? Stopped containers can still be removed with force.
containers.contextConfigInPlaceHint: Rename and restart policy only; the container is not removed.
containers.contextConfigRecreateHint: Edit the full spec and recreate the container (image, ports, env, …).
containers.configRuntimeHint: Applied via Docker rename/update without removing the container. Auto-remove (--rm) containers only support restart policy "no". Memory/CPU/PIDs use engine update.
containers.exportTarConfirm: Export the container filesystem to a tar file at a path you choose. Continue?
containers.configHint: Saving stops and removes this container, then creates and starts a new one with your settings. Bind mounts and most host options are preserved from the original inspect data. Anonymous volume data may be lost — back up first.
containers.configRecreateConfirm: The current container will be removed (after stop) and recreated with the edited configuration. Continue?
containers.portsColumnHint: One mapping per line: left of " : " is the host publish side, right is container port/protocol. Host "—" means EXPOSE only, not published to the host.
containers.batchRemoveConfirm: Remove {{count}} selected container(s)? Running ones will be force-removed. Continue?
containers.runtimeResourceHint: Memory/CPU/PIDs use engine update; changes may apply immediately or after a short delay on running containers.

images.title: Images
images.removeBulkConfirm: Remove {{count}} selected image(s)? This cannot be undone.
images.selectionHint: Click a row to select an image for tagging, history, and export; use checkboxes for multi-select delete.

networks.title: Networks
networks.removeBulkConfirm: Remove {{count}} selected network(s)? This cannot be undone.
networks.selectionHint: Click a row for connect actions below; use checkboxes for multi-select delete.

volumes.title: Volumes
volumes.removeConfirm: Delete this volume? Data will be lost.
volumes.removeBulkConfirm: Delete {{count}} selected volume(s)? Data will be lost.
volumes.selectionHint: Click a row to see which containers use the volume; use checkboxes for multi-select delete.

events.title: Docker events
events.subtitle: Engine event stream (JSON lines, summarized).
events.empty: Start subscription to see live events.

create.title: Create and start container
create.hint: Creates the container then starts it. Port format: host:container (e.g. 8080:80). CMD is split by spaces unless you leave it empty to use the image default.
create.name: Name
create.restartPolicyDisabledHint: Auto-remove cannot be combined with a restart policy; policy is set to “do not restart”.

system.title: System
system.reconnectDockerHint: Recreates the internal client; restart the app after changing DOCKER_HOST etc.
system.swarmNote: Swarm / plugins: not managed here; use CLI or dedicated tools.
system.tlsNote: Remote TLS: configure DOCKER_HOST, DOCKER_TLS_VERIFY, DOCKER_CERT_PATH, then restart the app.

logs.title: Container logs
logs.hint: Right-click a row or the bottom details panel for the menu (includes separate log window and file manager).
logs.windowMissingId: Missing container id in the URL; cannot open the log window.
logs.listContainersFailed: Could not load containers to resolve the name: {{detail}}

files.title: Files
files.windowMissingId: The link is missing a container ID; cannot open the file manager window.
files.empty: This folder is empty or could not be listed.
files.treeTargetHint: Upload and new folder use: selected directory path; if a file is selected, its parent directory; if nothing is selected, the tree root.
files.hint: Tree with columns similar to ls -l: mode, link count, owner, group, size in bytes, mtime. Click ▸ or double-click folders to expand/collapse. Large downloads are tar; edit is UTF-8 whole-file. Deletes are permanent.
files.pickFileToEdit: Select a file (not a directory) to edit.
files.binaryNotEditable: This file is not valid UTF-8 text; download it instead.
files.copyPathFailed: Could not copy to the clipboard.
files.openFolderFailed: Could not resolve the save folder.
files.discardMkdirInput: A folder name was entered. Close without creating?
